arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the hours of operation.

config.description: The configuration of the hours of operation, specifying the start and end times for each day.

description.description: A description of the hours of operation.

hours_of_operation_id.description: The unique identifier for the hours of operation.

id.description: The ID of the hours of operation resource.

name.description: The name of the hours of operation.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the hours of operation.

time_zone.description: The time zone in which the hours of operation are set.
